findings.issue: Whole dashboard is still hidden behind the mandatory 'Logg på med Apple' wall. Sign-in fails with 'Kunne ikke starte Apple-innlogging (AUTHENTICATION_FAILED)' and there is no fallback/skip — no agenda, header masthead, events, or 'Dette dekker vi' section render at all. The product's core promise (a calm scannable agenda) is completely invisible.
Same as 375px: only the Apple sign-in card and AUTHENTICATION_FAILED error are visible; no dashboard content renders.
Same as smaller widths: only the Apple sign-in card and AUTHENTICATION_FAILED error are visible; no dashboard content renders.

notes: This is an unchanged repeat of the 2026-07-21 finding (see previous run + ui-fix-log.json's same-day review): the gate is a deliberate owner decision (commit f905fc70a, documented inline in index.html:22-26) — body.gated hides all content until Sign in with Apple succeeds. ui-fix correctly declined to touch it as out-of-mandate (reversing an explicit owner decision).

Could not assess ANY of the correctness/layout checklist (match name truncation, streaming channel/foreign-broadcaster check, times, flags/crests, must-see accent, header/footer) at any width — everything behind the auth gate is unreachable without a successful Apple sign-in, and this screenshot harness has no network path to Apple's CloudKit web services.

The gate screen itself (wordmark, lead copy, sign-in button, error text) remains well laid out at all three widths: no overflow, no clipping, no truncation, calm and centered — same visual quality as yesterday.

Flagging as high again (not escalating further) purely because it means visual QA cannot verify the actual product at all, run after run, in this offline harness. A human should confirm whether real signed-in users in production see the dashboard fine (this may be purely an artifact of the no-network screenshot environment), and whether an anonymous/public view is still intended given the calm-dashboard vision in CLAUDE.md.
